hooks.command: { ci=$(gh run list --limit 1 --json status,conclusion,name 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.[0] | "\(.conclusion // .status) \(.name)"' 2>/dev/null); conflict=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -c '^UU\|^AA\|^DD'); tserr=$(tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' 2>/dev/null); msgs=''; [ "$conflict" -gt 0 ] && msgs="⚠️ マージ競合${conflict}件 "; [ "$tserr" -gt 0 ] && msgs="${msgs}⚠️ 型エラー${tserr}件 "; echo "$ci" | grep -q 'failure' && msgs="${msgs}⚠️ CI FAILURE: $ci "; [ -z "$msgs" ] && echo 'OK' || echo "$msgs"; }
hooks.statusMessage: セッション初期チェック中...

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); case "$FILE" in src/*) { npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5 & TSC=$!; npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -8 & VIT=$!; wait $TSC $VIT; } ;; *.json) npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -3 ;; docs/*|*.md) bun run docs:validate 2>&1 | tail -3 ;; *) true ;; esac
